mapper.sql: CONVERT(INT, ATT_ID) AS id, CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(USER_CODE) = 1 THEN CONVERT(BIGINT, USER_CODE) ELSE NULL END AS enroll_id, ATT_DATETIME AS records_time, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(COL2) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, COL2) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS mode, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(INOUT_ID) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, INOUT_ID) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS intOut, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(COL3) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, COL3) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS event, SLNO AS device_serial_num, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(COL5) = 1 THEN CONVERT(FLOAT, COL5) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS temperature, COL6 AS image
mapper.select:
select
from ATTLOG order by ATT_ID desc
mapper.insert:
insert into ATTLOG ( SLNO, USER_CODE, ATT_DATE, ATT_DATETIME, INOUT_ID, COL2, COL3, COL4, ISFTP, COL5, COL6, COL7, COL8, COL9, cap_date ) values ( #{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), ISNULL( CONVERT( DATETIME, CONVERT( DATE, CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END ) ), CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())) ), ISNULL( CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END, GETDATE() ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER}), CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{mode,jdbcType=INTEGER}), CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{event,jdbcType=INTEGER}), '0', 0, CASE WHEN #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE}) END, #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULL, NULL, NULL, GETDATE() );
INSERT INTO SRAW ( ATT_DATE, EMP_CODE, IN_OUT, CARDNO, AREA_ID, IO_UPDATE, INOUT, downloaded_date, SAPID, BODY_TEMP, IS_MASKED ) SELECT ISNULL( CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END, GETDATE() ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), CASE WHEN #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER} = 1 THEN 'OUT' ELSE 'IN' END, CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), (SELECT TOP 1 ID FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ORDER BY ID DESC), 0, '0', GETDATE(), 0, CASE WHEN #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE} IS NULL THEN CONVERT(MONEY, 0) ELSE CONVERT(MONEY, #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE}) END, 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SRAW S WHERE S.EMP_CODE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND S.ATT_DATE = ISNULL( CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END, GETDATE() ) AND S.IN_OUT = CASE WHEN #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER} = 1 THEN 'OUT' ELSE 'IN' END AND ( S.AREA_ID = (SELECT TOP 1 ID FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ORDER BY ID DESC) OR ( S.AREA_ID IS NULL AND (SELECT TOP 1 ID FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ORDER BY ID DESC) IS NULL ) ) )

insert into ATTLOG ( SLNO, USER_CODE, ATT_DATE, ATT_DATETIME, INOUT_ID, COL2, COL3, COL4, ISFTP, COL5, COL6, COL7, COL8, COL9, cap_date ) values ( #{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), ISNULL( CONVERT( DATETIME, CONVERT( DATE, CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END ) ), CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())) ), ISNULL( CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END, GETDATE() ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER}), CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{mode,jdbcType=INTEGER}), CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{event,jdbcType=INTEGER}), '0', 0, CASE WHEN #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE}) END, #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULL, NULL, NULL, GETDATE() );
INSERT INTO SRAW ( ATT_DATE, EMP_CODE, IN_OUT, CARDNO, AREA_ID, IO_UPDATE, INOUT, downloaded_date, SAPID, BODY_TEMP, IS_MASKED ) SELECT ISNULL( CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END, GETDATE() ), CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), CASE WHEN #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER} = 1 THEN 'OUT' ELSE 'IN' END, CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), (SELECT TOP 1 ID FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ORDER BY ID DESC), 0, '0', GETDATE(), 0, CASE WHEN #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE} IS NULL THEN CONVERT(MONEY, 0) ELSE CONVERT(MONEY, #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE}) END, 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SRAW S WHERE S.EMP_CODE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND S.ATT_DATE = ISNULL( CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE NULL END, GETDATE() ) AND S.IN_OUT = CASE WHEN #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER} = 1 THEN 'OUT' ELSE 'IN' END AND ( S.AREA_ID = (SELECT TOP 1 ID FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ORDER BY ID DESC) OR ( S.AREA_ID IS NULL AND (SELECT TOP 1 ID FROM NetWork WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(#{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR})) ORDER BY ID DESC) IS NULL ) ) )
mapper.update:
update ATTLOG
USER_CODE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}),
ATT_DATETIME = CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE ATT_DATETIME END, ATT_DATE = CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120))) ELSE ATT_DATE END,
COL2 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{mode,jdbcType=INTEGER}),
INOUT_ID = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER}),
COL3 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{event,jdbcType=INTEGER}),
SLNO = #{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COL5 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE}),
COL6 = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cap_date = GETDATE()
where ATT_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update ATTLOG set USER_CODE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{enrollId,jdbcType=BIGINT}), ATT_DATETIME = CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120) ELSE ATT_DATETIME END, ATT_DATE = CASE WHEN ISDATE(#{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) = 1 THEN CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(DATETIME, #{recordsTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 120))) ELSE ATT_DATE END, COL2 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{mode,jdbcType=INTEGER}), INOUT_ID = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{intout,jdbcType=INTEGER}), COL3 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{event,jdbcType=INTEGER}), SLNO = #{deviceSerialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COL5 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), #{temperature,jdbcType=DOUBLE}), COL6 = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cap_date = GETDATE() where ATT_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
